criteria.criterion: Append updates stored content bytes on disk
criteria.test: TestContentAppend (reads back via cs.Read after each append)

criteria.criterion: Threshold-crossing signal fires exactly once, on the crossing append
criteria.test: TestContentAppend (counts true returns across the append loop, asserts == 1, asserts it is false before and after that specific append)

criteria.criterion: WAL-before-apply discipline preserved for Append (same as Create)
criteria.test: reuses Append's WAL.AppendAndApply call path structurally identical to createWithHook; no separate hook test added (not required by test spec), covered indirectly by existing TestFsyncBeforeApply pattern applying to shared wal.AppendAndApply primitive

criteria.criterion: Append on unknown fileID reports ErrNotFound
